pub struct Event {
    pub ts: DateTime<Utc>,
    #[serde(rename = "type")]
    pub event_type: EventType,
    #[serde(flatten)]
    pub data: serde_json::Value,
}
pub enum EventType {
    ChunksIndexed,
    SearchPerformed,
    IngestionStarted,
    IngestionCompleted,
    MergeCompleted,
    MergeFailed,
    EntryCommitted,
    SessionOpened,
    SessionClosed,
    GcCompleted,
}
